event: Allegorical scene of virtue or divine wisdom
symbols: female figure in rich garments — possibly Wisdom, Justice, or another theological virtue
male figure with muscular torso — possibly Fortitude or a heroic virtue
clouds and sky — the heavenly realm from which virtue descends
illusionistic architectural frame — the boundary between earthly and celestial spheres
grisaille putti at corners — decorative angelic presences framing the divine revelation
description: A ceiling fresco painted in the di-sotto-in-su (from below upward) perspective, framed by elaborate illusionistic architectural moldings with grisaille putti figures at the corners. The central scene shows two principal figures against a dramatic cloudy sky. At left, a richly dressed female figure in green and golden-yellow garments sits or reclines, gesturing toward the right. At right, a semi-nude muscular male figure in an orange-brown cloak reaches or gestures in response.
